rationale: Section 26.013 defines the unused increment rate via formula using voter-approval tax rate, actual tax rate, and total value. No homestead exemption amount is hardcoded; the formula self-adjusts to changed taxable values from the new exemption.
quote: UNUSED INCREMENT RATE = (YEAR 1 FOREGONE REVENUE AMOUNT + YEAR 2 FOREGONE REVENUE AMOUNT + YEAR 3 FOREGONE REVENUE AMOUNT) / CURRENT TOTAL VALUE
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed exemption increase alters taxable value inputs but does not require amendment of §26.013, whose formulas are value-agnostic.
